text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the intensity of the Japanese
Derby, Mejiro Ardan receives some bad news.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She learns that Sakura Chiyono O, who she ran
alongside, is to be hospitalized due to a serious
injury, and she won't be racing for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This should be just about everything you'll need
at the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Ardan... You should be training but
you're here helping me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, come on now, you needn't feel guilty. You
did just the same for me whenever I was
hospitalized or discharged.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural that I should be here for you too.
If we've shared a roof, we ought to be able to
share our troubles as well... don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Would you like to get some fresh air with me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That sounds nice, but wouldn't that worsen your
condition?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll be fine! I was told not to run, but I'm allowed
to walk as long as I take it slow.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Also... I want to take a look around the academy
since I won't be coming back here for some time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Understandable. Let's go for a walk then, shall
we?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I wonder when I'll get to run on this track again...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. We finally ran the Japanese Derby, and
though it wasn't long ago, it feels almost like a
dream now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, it wasn't a dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It was a very, very special race... one in which
you, Yaeno Muteki, and I all pitted all we had
against one another.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes... You're right.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It was a once-in-a-lifetime race... full of
memories...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
To think that I was able to run that race with both
you and Yaeno that day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm just... so glad.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Oh no! It's almost time for me to leave!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear! Let's hurry back and pick up your
belongings.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Well... I should get going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Right... Do take care.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And also...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I hope we can run again, together, in a race even
more magnificent than the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall be waiting for you on the turf, Chiyono O...
as your rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best! I won't let this be the end!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I want to run with you and Yaeno even more... So!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I swear that someday... I'll make my comeback!
Until then, wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Of course.
...I believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay... I'll be off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...You can do it, Chiyono O. I just know you've
got what it takes to get through this and return to
racing.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Just as you were there for me, it's now my turn to
be there for you. So I'll be there, waiting for
you...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Has Chiyono O departed?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, she left a moment ago.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I was shocked at how you and Chiyono O ran in
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Or rather, if I may be candid... it would not be
inaccurate to say that I was thunderstruck.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The sheer determination the two of you displayed
in that fleeting instant... The way you ran with
unbound spirit... These sights remain vivid in my
mind.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was reminded once again... that you are both
unmistakably worthy opponents.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Thus, I have made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When the time comes, I will run against and best
you both in a direct contest. I swear it...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: As an archrival... to both of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Yaeno... So she believes as well!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(She believes that Chiyono O will race with us
again...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I welcome the challenge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I, too, shall run with all my heart against you and
Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...As your rival!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is with me in my office, recounting
everything that happened today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And when she finishes talking, I see in her eyes a
light of fierce determination that's brighter than
ever before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...A newfound feeling stirs within me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Until now, all my intense training and racing has
been in an effort to leave a dazzling trail of light
behind me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But the person I am right now seeks more than
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno considers me her rival, and for her, I wish
to do myself proud.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wish to reach the same level as Chiyono O,
whom I've no doubt at all will return to racing one
day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I can feel these wishes deep down, burning with
the intensity of a raging inferno.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. May I ask you to show me the way?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To a stage upon which I can aim for even greater
heights, as a rival to both Yaeno and Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my mind, I can envision two futures that satisfy
her request.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first would see her participate in the final
race of the Triple Crown tour—the long-distance
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki, who fully considers Mejiro Ardan
her rival, will likely be making an appearance at
the Kikuka Sho as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I did make Mejiro Ardan race in a long-distance
race like that, I'd effectively be forcing her into
an uphill battle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That being said, if I put Mejiro Ardan—as she is
right now—up against Yaeno Muteki again, their
clash could reveal a path to greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second future would entail Mejiro Ardan
making an appearance at the autumn Tenno Sho,
a prestigious medium-distance race dominated by
top senior-year racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And if my predictions are right, two particular
runners—whose names are known to every racer
of this era—will be attending the race too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"The Beast" Oguri Cap... and Tamamo Cross, "the
White Lightning."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is a prodigy from the countryside who
rose to the top ranks by achieving a miraculous
streak of wins after her debut. Right now, her
incredible talents are the focus of a great deal of
attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As fate would have it, she's in the same year as
Mejiro Ardan, so perhaps they were bound to
compete against one another sooner or later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then there's Tamamo Cross, who managed a
ludicrous series of victories during her senior year.
She's hailed as the number one in the country
and—in this moment—the pinnacle of the racing
world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Ardan hoping to cast an unfading
trail of light upon the present itself, there's
definitely a lot she could learn from racing such a
trailblazing opponent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A battle against two giant stars who have made
waves across their generation might just show her
a new world of possibilities!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Ardan's trainer, the future I'm going to
show her is...
choice_data_list: Let's enter the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The goal race is now the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...The Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My battle will be against Yaeno once more, I see.
choice_data_list: It's going to be a tough race.
It's going to be a tough race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, it will be. But I knew it would be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I have chosen "the steepest, most strenuous path of all." And the moment in which I can truly shine is found in the heat of such fierce battles.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I wonder what will happen during our
race. Just thinking about it makes my heart soar.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Starting with tomorrow's training... I'll be counting
on you once again, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having set our sights on the Kikuka Sho, we
solemnly swear—with the night sky as our
witness—to push ahead toward our next battle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The goal race is now the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...The autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
So that race is to be the site of my next
battle—against the runners hailed as the greatest
of this moment.
choice_data_list: It's going to be a tough race.
It's going to be a tough race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, it will be. But I knew it would be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I have chosen "the steepest, most strenuous path of all." And the now in which I can truly shine is found in the heat of such fierce battles.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I wonder what manner of running I can
expect from the senior year racers. Just thinking
about the race makes my heart soar.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Starting with tomorrow's training... I'll be counting
on you once again, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having set our sights on the autumn Tenno Sho,
we solemnly swear—with the night sky as our
witness—to push ahead toward our next battle!
